title: Remove Numerology service and hide prices from all services

requirements.text: Remove the Numerology service entry entirely from the Services page listing so it no longer appears to users.
acceptanceCriteria: The Numerology service card/section is not visible on the Services page.
No reference to Numerology appears in the services list.

requirements.text: Remove the price/pricing display from all service entries on the Services page so no pricing information is shown to users.
acceptanceCriteria: No price, fee, or cost information is displayed for any service on the Services page.
All other service details (name, description, features) remain intact.

constraints: Do not remove or modify any other services besides Numerology.
Do not alter the backend data schema or service records — changes are frontend display only.
nonGoals: Removing prices from the Home page services grid or any other page.
Modifying the backend actor or stored service data.
Changing any other content or layout of the Services page.
